data.body: Human-directed creative collaboration. Hero visual + branding imagery. Julianna drives aesthetic choices; agents assist with generation tools. NOT a blocker for homepage build — homepage uses color/gradient placeholders. Deliverable: hero graphic + key branding imagery in public/images/.

Reviewed moodboard references across Asimov structure sources and Julianna visual DNA sets. Added plan details and wrote notes/ASMV-12-hero-graphics-brief.md with 3 concept directions plus prompt pack for base hero stills and transparent overlay fragments. Recommendation: start with Dustlight Atrium direction.

Updated hero brief to drawing-first constraints: no rendered/glossy outputs, mostly monochrome graphite language, Pinterest-like drafted quality. Added new concept naming (Threshold Drawing), software-as-annotation guidance, and round-1 matrix (8 candidates + overlay set).

Reviewed first generated hero candidate in research/moodboard/AI generated hero image tests. Strong concept clarity: tactile desk-to-laptop translation and subtle network path. Next iteration guidance: reduce literal laptop realism by ~30%, simplify desk clutter, strengthen axonometric continuity, increase intentional negative space for headline, and shift from UI-like terminal box to softer marginal annotation style.

Reviewed second generated candidate (2026-03-04 17:01). Improvements: immersive nature context and clearer layered network overlay. Gaps vs target: image leans illustrative/narrative rather than abstract editorial hero; network overlay too tech-literal (circuit-board iconography); laptop remains literal device object; reduced negative space for typography. Next prompt should enforce abstraction, axonometric drafting language, and sparse non-iconic system traces.
